normal-pet.name: Normal Pet
normal-pet.description: A Tiny animal of a type you choose (a cat, bird, rodent, and so on). It has the minion trait, gaining 2 actions when you Command an Animal (no Nature check needed). A pet can't make Strikes.
normal-pet.notes: Tiny; land Speed 25 feet; low-light vision. Perception, Acrobatics, and Stealth scale with your level. Lets you choose two pet abilities.

aquatic-pet.name: Aquatic Pet
aquatic-pet.description: A Tiny aquatic animal of a type you choose (a fish, octopus, jellyfish, and so on). It has the minion trait, gaining 2 actions when you Command an Animal (no Nature check needed). A pet can't make Strikes.
aquatic-pet.notes: Tiny; swim Speed 25 feet; low-light vision. Perception, Acrobatics, and Stealth scale with your level. Lets you choose two pet abilities.
